role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (arid hills, reeds) consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant types (Arundo donax/Phragmites) and their habitat context.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road infrastructure (curbs, asphalt) and absence of signage, fitting the domain.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like camera generation and infrastructure style.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Peru. The specialists provided grounded, image-consistent evidence, and the tournament effectively used the meta-evidence (curb design) to distinguish Peru from the closest rival, Chile.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of arid hills and reeds match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Plant identification is consistent with the visual evidence.
